narrative:
Jennings Twp (precinct in Putnam County) has 1,412 registered voters, with 50.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.6 percentage points.
